text: The Department of the California Highway Patrol may require any driver, or the owner of a common carrier vehicle, involved in any accident of which a report must be made as provided in Section 20008 to file supplemental reports and may require witnesses of accidents to render reports to it whenever the original report is insufficient in the opinion of such department.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 10. ACCIDENTS AND ACCIDENT REPORTS [20000 - 20018]
### Chapter 1. Accidents and Accident Reports [20000 - 20018]
##### § 20009

The Department of the California Highway Patrol may require any driver, or the owner of a common carrier vehicle, involved in any accident of which a report must be made as provided in Section 20008 to file supplemental reports and may require witnesses of accidents to render reports to it whenever the original report is insufficient in the opinion of such department.

*(Enacted by Stats. 1959, Ch. 3.)*
